THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONNELLY, INDV & DBA BUG & HARE REPAIR (APPELLANT) $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $91.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,716.00

ROOM 220, JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY, CSR, GGOROSIN, CLERK 9:30 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLTF RESPONDENT PRESENT W/ COUNSEL ANNE HIPSHMAN, DEFT APPELLANT PATRICK DONNELLY PRESENT AND IN PRO PER. THIS IS AN APPEAL FROM THE AWARD AND DECISION OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-23-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 220
